data.name: Spooky Milk Life
data.detailed_description:
歡迎來到 Spooky Milk Life！
在這款高品質的R-18成人冒險遊戲中實現你的幻想。


名為Mid Night Falls的小鎮發生了神秘事件。
你的父親突然失蹤，你即將與家人重逢。
你能修復與家人的關係嗎？


Spooky Milk Life 是一款點擊式冒險遊戲。
探索小鎮並結識擁有美麗Spine動畫的可愛角色。
神秘的地城等待著你，
用回合制戰鬥擊敗怪物！
地城為程序生成，每次冒險都與眾不同！

- 系統 -
+ 時間系統：NPC在白天／夜晚／週末的行為會有所不同
+ 多樣化道具與合成系統
+ 主線任務與豐富支線任務
+ 滿足各種癖好的趣味角色
+ 滿滿情慾笑話與情色場景

...更多內容將持續更新！

data.short_description: 歡迎來到 Spooky Milk Life， 探索充滿性感角色與情慾場景的Mid Night Falls神秘小鎮。 程序生成的地城與回合制戰鬥等你挑戰。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 日文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 泰文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual Core or higher (SSE2 support)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DX10 (Shader Model 4.0) capable
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: SSD recommended

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.12+
  • 處理器: 1.2+ GHz & SSE2 support
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Metal capable Intel and AMD GPUs
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Spooky Milk Life
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to 'Spooky Milk Life'!
Make your fantasy true in this high-quality r-18 adult adventure game.




Mysterious things are happening in this little town named Mid Night Falls.
Your father is in missing suddenly, and you are about to reunion with your family again.
Can you restore the relationship between you and your family?




Spooky Milk Life is basically Point and Click style adventure game.
Explore the town and meet pretty characters with beautiful Spine animation.
Also, there're dungeons in this mysterious town,
Struggle in dungeons and beat monsters with turn-based battle!
Dungeons are created procedurally so your adventure will never be the same!

- System -
+ Time system: NPCs will act differently Day/Night/Weekend
+ Various Items and crafting system
+ Main quests and numerous side quests
+ Interesting characters to satisfy your fetish
+ Lots of erotic scenes with sexual jokes

...And will be updated more!

data.supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Spanish - Latin America, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Thai, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or later
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Dual Core or higher (SSE2 support)
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DX10 (Shader Model 4.0) capable
  • DirectX: Version 10
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: SSD recommended

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: macOS 10.12+
  • Processor: 1.2+ GHz & SSE2 support
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Metal capable Intel and AMD GPUs
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
